free_text: Production cross sections of radioactive nuclides on
silver target irradiated by protons at energy 660 MeV
Final, combined publication (in
Russian), see REL-REF
English Transl. of IZV,59,206
Silver target with diameter 30 mm and thickness
0.229 gram/cm2.
-flux monitor
Time of irradiation is 10 minutes by proton
- cr.sect. on Ti, V, Ga, Ge isotopes
- cr.sect. on Zr isotopes
- cr.sect. on Sn isotopes
- cr.sect. on Mo isotopes
Experimental errors of the measurements,
which do not include errors of the gamma-yields,
half-lives and monitor reaction cross section.
Tbl.3
-By Compiler- Original report does not contain needed
labels for cumulative and independent cross sections.
Combined paper contains similar, labels but compiler
observed that author terminology has some differences
from EXFOR one. Besides some mistakes were found.
Compiler labeled reactions according to his experience
and Table of Radioactive Isotopes of E.Brown and
R.B.Firestone.
Small correction in reference.
Last checking has been done.
SD: REL-REF added. Author's names corrected
according to BAS publ. SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION
code in Subents 002-054.
SD: Corrections in several Subents.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
SD: SF4=Ag-105g -> Ag-105 in REACTION code.
Independent.
-By Compiler- The Authors assigned 207 day activity to
Rh-102m. But ENSDF-95 suggests that this activity is
activity of ground state of Pd-102.
Independent.
-By Compiler- The authors assigned 2.9 years activity
to Rh -102g. But ENSDF-95 suggests that this activity
is activity of isomer state. The reader must take in
attention that this half-life is measured approximately
only.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Pd-101 was subtracted from the
result or not.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Pd-100 was subtracted from the
result or not.
-By Compiler- Ground state of Rh-99 is populated
due to decay of Pd-99 very small. Compiler paid
attention that cross section for ground state
production is less than cross section for isomer
production.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
Independent.
-By Compiler- This cross section is absent in combined
paper.
- By Compiler - The probability of Tc-95 isomer state
due to radioactive decay of Ru-95 is very low.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Ru-95 was subtracted from the
result or not.
-By Compiler- The probability to create ground state of
Tc-94 due to radioactive decay of Ru-94 less than 0.1%
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
-By Compiler - Isomer state of Mo-93 cannot be
produced due to radioactive decay of Tc-93.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
- By Compiler - The authors did not explain the method
to take into account 95-Zr decay.
Independent
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Mo-90 was subtracted from the
result or not.
SD: SF4=Nb-90g -> Nb-90 in REACTION code.
-By Compiler- This cross section is not cumulative,
because this cross section is less than cross section
for parent - Zr-88 - production.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
-By Compiler- The authors did not explain the method to
take into account radioactive decay of Zr-87.
-By Compiler- The authors did not explain the method of
taking into account radioactive decay of 87-Zr.
Compiler believes that cross section for isomer
production has been subtracted.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Zr-86 was subtracted from the
result or not. This cross section is absent in
combined paper.
SD: SF4=Y-86g -> Y-86 in REACTION code.
-By Compiler- Combined paper labeled this cross
section as independent. It is mistake, obviously.
half-life of parent -Zr-85- is 7.86 minutes and Y-85
isomer state will be populated with probability > 75%.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Y-85m was subtracted from the
result or not.
SD: 2.6 -> 0.26mb in DATA-ERR col.
according to the Table.
SD: Y-84m -> Y-84g in DECAY-DATA and
REACTION code. COMMENT deleted.
Independent

fro REACTION code.
-By Compiler- It is not clear whether the deposit from
radioactive decay of Sr-83 was subtracted from the
result or not.
- By Compiler - Radioactive decay 82-Sr does not
populate isomer state of 82-Rb.
SD: SF5=IND deleted from REACTION code.
-By Compiler- Combined paper does not contain cross
sections for Kr-85m
-By Compiler- Combined paper does not contain cross
sections for Kr-79g
